'''Lorfo''' was a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] who lived in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]] during the latter days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He ran a shop on [[Treasure Ship Row/Legends|Treasure Ship Row]] and was friends with both [[Rostek Horn]] and [[Nejaa Halcyon]].

When [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Ylenic It'kla]] arrived on the planet under orders from [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] to [[Mission to Corellia (Clone Wars)|find]] the scientist, [[Ratri Tane]], they ran into Lorfo in a bar, who offered them a drink.<ref name="Elusion Illusion" />

He helped the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in reaching the lair of [[Tendir Blue]].<ref name="Elusion Illusion" />
